name: bean
description: Local hybrid search over your Slack, Google Drive, GitHub, Confluence, Jira, and 5 more connectors plus local files — no server, your credentials, your machine.

plugins.name: bean
plugins.description: Local hybrid search over your work knowledge, as a Claude Code plugin. /bean <question>, /bean sync, /bean init. Credentials stay yours; Lance + DuckDB under ~/.bean.
